text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm filling out some paperwork when Mayano Top
Gun's homeroom teacher informs me that she
didn't show up for class...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, a vapor trail... I bet it'd be fun to ride one of
those...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...I don't wanna go to class. It's so boring.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Racing, shopping, talking... All the things I used
to like... They're all so boring.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And my body's feeling heavier and heavier...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Running back-to-back races must be taking a toll
on her. I'd better adjust her race schedule...
